mnemonics.title: Quantifier Order
mnemonics.content: For quantifier order: ∀∃ = 'For All, there Exists' (everyone has someone), ∃∀ = 'There Exists for All' (someone for everyone)

mnemonics.title: FOL Components
mnemonics.content: Remember FOL parts: Constants, Variables, Functions, Predicates, Connectives, Quantifiers (CVFPCQ)
